hero.availableNow: The app is now available for iOS & Android
hero.subtitle: No generic program. Your plan is built from your level, your sport and your equipment.

showcase.headline1: Pros don't train on generic plans.
showcase.subtitle: Your plan is built from your assessment, your sport, and your equipment.

items.title: Built around you, your sport, and your week.
items.description: You choose which days you train and whether you train at the gym, outdoors, or at home. JEMP builds the plan around it — tailored to your sport and only with exercises for the equipment you actually have.

items.title: Find out your score.
items.description: From your assessments — vertical jump, sprints, max strength, and more — JEMP calculates your scores from 1 to 100 per category. So you can always see your overall progress, compared against athletes of your age and gender.

items.title: See yourself improve.
items.description: After every plan you see your improvement right in your scores — and your next plan adapts to your new stats. So you're always training at exactly your level.

items.quote: “Really well-built app with high-quality training content. The workouts are effective, easy to follow, and fun. Perfect for improving athleticism and mobility in a targeted way. Absolute recommendation for every athlete who wants to take their performance to the next level!”
items.name: jasemin.asl
items.role: App Store review, translated from German

items.quote: “App is insane 🔥 Setting up training and profile was super easy, the plan looks great too, with videos and exact instructions — overall really brilliant 🤞”
items.name: John Brandon lee
items.role: App Store review, translated from German

items.quote: “Only been using the app for a short while but I can already say it's top!”
items.name: Azim.aro
items.role: App Store review, translated from German

items.question: Is JEMP free?
items.answer: You can try JEMP free for 7 days, no strings attached. After that, full access to all plans, assessments, and insights comes with a subscription — cancel anytime through the App Store or Play Store.

items.question: Which sports does JEMP work for?
items.answer: Practically every sport that demands athleticism — basketball, football, boxing, sprinting, and many more. You pick your sport during onboarding, and your plan is tailored to it.

items.question: Do I need a gym?
items.answer: No. You tell JEMP whether you train at the gym, outdoors, or at home, and which equipment you have — your plan only includes exercises you can actually do with it.

items.question: How does the assessment work?
items.answer: 30+ standardized tests across five categories: strength, jumps, upper and lower body plyometrics, and mobility. From your results, JEMP calculates a score from 1 to 100 per category — compared against athletes of your age and gender. You don't have to do all tests at once.

items.question: I'm a beginner — is JEMP still for me?
items.answer: Yes. Your plan is based on your level — from beginner to elite athlete. Exercises that are too hard for you simply don't show up. As you get better, the plan grows with you.

items.question: Which devices does JEMP run on?
items.answer: iOS and Android — you'll find JEMP on the App Store and Google Play.

earlyAccess.subtitle: Download JEMP and start with your first assessment.
earlyAccess.pricingNote: Try free for 7 days — then full access with a subscription.

intro.title: Become a JEMP UGC Creator
intro.description: Create content for the fastest growing fitness app. Apply with your social media channels – a UGC video is optional, but always welcome.
